description: Two endpoints, must traverse from either side, so it gets mirrored. The sigh is professional, not personal. Both EMA gain lands, both reprinted out of the Khans of Tarkir 10-card common gain-land cycle, both given fresh Eytan Zana art for the set, both figureless sublime-wilderness vistas. The matched-illustrator pairing is designer-coordinated and triviabot already caught it independently on both cards — exactly the load-bearing detail an edge is for, not a thin tag bridge.
other_candidates_considered: Tinkatuff (097/132) <-> Tinkaton (098/132): genuine evolution-line edge (Tinkatink -> Tinkatuff -> Tinkaton), category named-character-identity / chain. Deferred this wave because (a) both cards are vision-only, no Trivia section yet, and the spec prefers trivia-backed edges, and (b) it is the middle of a 3-stage chain whose first link, Tinkatink, is not in the corpus. Draw it as a chain once trivia lands and/or Tinkatink enters inventory, rather than committing a partial 2-of-3 chain now.

Thornweald Archer (EMA 189) <-> Timberwatch Elf (EMA 190): both green elves, both Pauper Elves archetype staples, adjacent collector numbers. Considered but NOT an edge this pass: shared creature type + shared format archetype is a tag/filter bridge, not narrative-canonical weight. They are not the same character, not the same plane (Thornweald is Lorwyn; Timberwatch is Onslaught-block elf tribal), not a designer-confirmed flavor cycle. No edge.
next_pass_suggestions: Tinkatuff/Tinkaton evolution-line chain edge once both are trivia-passed; promote to full chain if Tinkatink is acquired.
